violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -No date mark on wrapped breakfast sandwiches in walk in cooler.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Tornadoes in bottom of make table have discard dates of 11/25. -Breakfast pasties in walk in cooler have discard date of 12/2. -Dakota Tom sandwich had expire date of 12/2.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Heavy residue build up on pizza cooking trays.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Black debris at ice chute edges.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at side of cut table below utensils/pizza paddles. -Limescale residue build up in water well bottom of warmer. -Crumb debris in bottom of sauce refrigerator. -Food spill/residue at bottom shelf of small prep table next to make table. -Residue at make table door fronts. -Residue in hand sink basin.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Sleeves of pizza flats stored leaning on floor in pizza prep area and on floor near back door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. -Floor debris build up below shelving in walk in cooler and walk in freezer. -Debris at floor in cabinet below customer beverage line.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
